node.hint: Ping a node on the grid to scan its contents.

purity.title: PURITY SCAN
purity.desc: Rate the freshness of your last salvage. Your scan trains the fleet model.

manual.title: 1-Min Overview: Food Rescue Network
manual.intro_desc: We are a smart food-rescue network powered by IoT sensors. Become an Operator and rescue food before it reaches critical entropy (spoilage)!
manual.step1_desc1: Use the map to monitor smart nodes across the city in real-time:
manual.step1_li1: 🟢 Green Nodes: Food is fresh and stable.
manual.step1_li2: 🟡 Amber Pulses: Food is nearing expiration! Click to view live hardware sonar data and photos.
manual.step1_hint: >> HINT: Prioritize "High-Entropy" food for massive XP bonuses!
manual.step2_desc1: Rescue targets in three easy steps:
manual.step2_li1: 1. Reserve: Click [RESERVE]. Clearance is written to your RFID card.
manual.step2_li2: 2. Verify: Tap your card at the physical locker to automatically unlock it.
manual.step2_li3: 3. Extract: Once removed, the sonar detects the change, locks the door, and issues your rewards!
manual.step3_desc1: Every rescue yields bio-resources based on food type: PROTEIN, CARBS, and LIPIDS.
manual.step3_desc2: Spend them to upgrade your virtual "Assistants" for stronger abilities:
manual.nano_crab_desc: Increases max capacity for simultaneous reservations.
manual.nano_spider_desc: Optimizes hardware handshake latency for instant unlocking.
manual.nano_jelly_desc: Grants massive XP multipliers when rescuing highly spoiled food.
